about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Muhammad Arifin <gradient>Fadhil Nugroho</gradient>
about.desc: Hi! I'm <name>Arifin</name>, a Finance Management graduate from Muhammadiyah University of Surakarta. I have hands-on internship experience in data entry and administrative operations at Bank Syariah Indonesia (BSI), where I processed customer records with high accuracy and confidentiality.
about.pageDesc: I am a Finance Management graduate focused on financial data analysis, administrative operations, and database management. I ensure high precision in every ledger, report, and entry.
about.backgroundDesc: Equipped with an academic background in finance and banking, combined with practical internship training in processing customer profiles and managing financial databases.
about.philosophyDesc: I believe that precision in financial data entry and analysis is the foundation of sound business decisions and compliant operations.
about.eduDesc: Relevant Courses: Financial Management, Financial Technology (Fintech), Financial Statement Analysis, International Finance, Management of Financial Institutions.

projects.title: Portfolio Projects
projects.all_projects_desc: A compilation of finance and data analysis case studies, ranging from dashboard creation to auditing pipelines.

financial_dashboard.title: PT Indofood CBP Tbk Financial Performance Dashboard
financial_dashboard.description: A Power BI financial performance dashboard of PT Indofood CBP Tbk (2023–2025) to monitor profitability, liquidity, and leverage trends.
financial_dashboard.problem: Assessing the financial health of a giant FMCG emiten like PT Indofood CBP Tbk from raw financial statement spreadsheets is often slow and cumbersome. Management required instant visibility to track the impact of rising Cost of Goods Sold (COGS) on net margins and compare multi-year debt leverage vs equity structures.
financial_dashboard.solution: Integrated 3-year balance sheets and income statements (2023–2025) into a unified Power BI data model. Built custom DAX measures for profitability (GPM, NPM), liquidity (Current Ratio), and leverage (DER, DAR) while designing an interactive layout featuring asset/liability breakdowns.
financial_dashboard.impact: Delivered instant visibility showing that net profit grew significantly by ▲ 30.3% in 2025 to Rp9.22M due to operating margin efficiency (NPM rose to 12.3%), backed by an exceptionally strong liquidity position (Current Ratio of 4.15x) and a healthy debt leverage (DER) of 0.84x.
steps: Extracting annual balance sheets and income statements of PT Indofood CBP Tbk (2023–2025) from the IDX.
Performing data cleaning and nominal unit transformations (removing raw decimal figures) using Power Query.
Designing a structured star schema to link historical financial statement lines with dimension calendar tables.
Developing custom DAX measures to calculate NPM, GPM, ROE, Current Ratio, and Debt-to-Equity Ratio (DER).
Designing the interactive dashboard layout in Power BI Desktop featuring liquidity, solvency, and asset breakdowns.

data_cleaning.title: Financial Transaction Data Cleaning
data_cleaning.description: Designed an automated data auditing and cleaning pipeline using Power Query in Microsoft Excel to clean and standardize raw transactional data.
data_cleaning.problem: Raw transactional data exported from legacy banking and accounting systems is frequently corrupted with trailing whitespace, duplicate records, incorrect formats, and misaligned cell structures.
data_cleaning.solution: Designed a robust, automated data auditing template in Microsoft Excel using Power Query. Created automatic data validation routines to isolate anomalies, correct text cases, and align dates without manual editing.
data_cleaning.impact: Minimized data preparation errors, eliminated manual checking, and prepared 100% clean datasets for reporting and analytics.
steps: Importing unstructured raw financial transaction datasets from legacy accounting databases.
Identifying duplicates, extra spacing, corrupted characters, and entry anomalies using Power Query.
Applying TRIM, CLEAN, and custom column splits to clean vendor names and transaction account codes.
Standardizing date formatting, currency values, and handling missing rows automatically.
Saving the pipeline as an audit template that automatically cleans new monthly transaction sheets instantly.

budgeting_tool.title: Automated Budget Tracking & Forecasting
budgeting_tool.description: Developed a custom budgeting and cash flow forecasting tool in Google Sheets using structured logical formulas and automated alert scripts.
budgeting_tool.problem: Traditional budgeting spreadsheets require manual entry for forecasting and lack proactive warnings for budget overruns, increasing the risk of cash shortages.
budgeting_tool.solution: Developed a custom Google Sheets forecasting model using Excel VBA/Google Apps Script. Embedded conditional formulas to trigger alerts when department expenditures exceeded 85% of allocated funds.
budgeting_tool.impact: Enabled real-time budget tracking, resulting in fewer budget overruns and more accurate forecasting of upcoming monthly runway.
steps: Mapping monthly budget requirements and operational cost structures for each company division.
Building a centralized input sheet with strict data validation criteria in Google Sheets / Microsoft Excel.
Setting up structured formulas (INDEX-MATCH, SUMIFS, conditional logic) for real-time expenditure aggregation.
Developing automation scripts (Google Apps Script / VBA) for month-end freeze and auto-sync features.
Installing conditional formatting rules as early-warning indicators when spending exceeds 85% of threshold.

financial_analysis_simulation.title: Simulation: Financial Statement Analysis [Company Name]
financial_analysis_simulation.description: [Replace This Text] Brief project description. Example: Built an interactive financial statement analysis dashboard using Excel & Power BI to monitor business performance periodically.
financial_analysis_simulation.problem: [Replace This Text] The business problem faced. Example: Financial statement data is scattered across separate Excel sheets, making it slow for management to see monthly profitability trends.
financial_analysis_simulation.solution: [Replace This Text] The solution you created. Example: Integrated Excel data using Power Query, designed a star schema data model, and calculated financial ratios using DAX.
financial_analysis_simulation.impact: [Replace This Text] The tangible outcome of your project. Example: Automatic monthly reporting saved 80% of manual effort and provided instant profit margin trend visibility.
steps: [Step 1: Data Collection] Download official financial statement spreadsheet files from IDX for your chosen company (e.g. Kalbe Farma, Indofood).
[Step 2: ETL & Cleaning] Load data into Excel/Power Query to clean empty columns, filter unnecessary rows, and format dates.
[Step 3: Data Modeling] Establish relationships between Balance Sheet and Income Statement fact tables with a dimension Calendar table in Power BI.
[Step 4: Financial Ratios] Write custom DAX measures for Net Profit Margin, Return on Equity, Return on Assets, and Debt-to-Equity to analyze health.
[Step 5: Visual Design] Create interactive charts for profit trends, assets breakdown, and ratio comparisons on the Power BI dashboard.
